enemy.name: The Tenure Guardian
enemy.special: onPlayerNoCharge: gains +1 Strength. Currently has 12 block, gaining more.

hand.name: Slow
hand.description: Skip enemy's next defend or buff action. Charge bonus: also weaken.

relics.name: Chain Reactor
relics.description: Knowledge Chains of 2+ deal 6 splash damage per chain link.

notes: Tenure Guardian is a block-stacker that punishes Quick Play. Player is below half HP. The Slow card can cancel the incoming defend action (prevents it gaining 6 more block). Chain Reactor is useless here (chain=0). Reckless self-damages a low-HP player. Piercing bypasses block. This is a 'do you spend 2 AP to Slow or do you just Pierce through the existing block?' puzzle. Without Slow the enemy will have 18 block next turn.
